criteria.evidence: "7-year operations & project manager in logistics and healthcare ops ... career switcher into product with no formal PM or engineering experience."
criteria.reason: One sentence; matches the resume (7 yrs ops/PM, logistics + healthcare); names the real strongest signal (cross-functional program ownership) and explicitly frames as career switcher, NOT 'product manager.' Matches the expected headline exactly.

criteria.evidence: "Onboarding time 11 weeks -> 7 weeks", "~$220k/year supply-cost savings", "5 warehouse sites ... Scheduling errors cut ~one third", "14 new clinic locations"
criteria.reason: Evidence inventory captures every load-bearing experience and all real numbers the expectations call for (11->7 wks, $220k, -1/3 errors, 14 clinics, 5 sites). Nothing major dropped; vendor-liaison 'did not build' nuance preserved.

criteria.evidence: "Cross-functional program ownership - backed by the 14-clinic onboarding program ..."; "Disagreeing up with data - backed by pushing back on the 14-sites-in-one-quarter plan with staffing math"
criteria.reason: Every strength cites a specific experience; no free-floating adjectives. Strengths are explicitly framed as transferable operating skills (stakeholder mgmt, prioritization, turning fuzzy pain into ranked issues), never claimed as product experience.

criteria.evidence: "Open questions: ... Any exposure to PRDs, agile/discovery techniques, or working with designers (resume says none - confirm)."; "what she has NOT done is own a product backlog, write a PRD, or ship software with designers and engineers"
criteria.reason: Genuinely missing info (team size, # programs, SQL depth, metrics ownership, PRD/agile exposure) is asked for, not invented. The dominant PM-craft gap is surfaced honestly rather than guessed or papered over.

criteria.evidence: Two ambiguous metrics are marked "⚠️ needs a number (team size, # programs)" and "⚠️ needs a number (issues triaged, adoption)" rather than invented.
criteria.reason: Cross-checked every number against the persona: 7 yrs, 14 clinics, 11->7 wks, ~$220k, 5 sites, ~1/3 error cut all trace exactly. No fabricated product/PM/engineering experience. Missing numbers flagged, not invented. Zero fabrication.
